page: OVHcloud l4-360 is a GPU-accelerated server within the Cloud GPU family, powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 90 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 AMD EPYC 9454 processor operating at 2.75 GHz. The system is equipped with 360 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. For local storage, the server includes a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and it supports a baseline network bandwidth of 25 Gbps.

The primary hardware highlight is the inclusion of four NVIDIA L4 GPUs based on the Ada Lovelace architecture, delivering a combined 96 GB of VRAM. This GPU configuration is paired with a highly capable CPU subsystem that supports advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 vector and neural network instructions (AVX512_VNNI, AVX512_BF16) and cryptographic acceleration (AES, VAES, SHA_NI).

Performance benchmarks place this server in the top tier for both single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests, as well as Passmark CPU and memory evaluations. It demonstrates exceptional capability in multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and software compilation. For artificial intelligence workloads, the system achieves top-tier performance in LLM inference prompt processing and text generation across small and medium models, while maintaining strong performance for large models.

This server offers high resource density, combining substantial dedicated CPU cores with multi-GPU acceleration. This configuration is highly cost-efficient for workloads requiring parallel processing without the overhead of multi-node setups. It is suited for large-scale machine learning inference, data science pipelines, 3D rendering, and intensive software compilation.
description: OVHcloud l4-360 is a high-density GPU-accelerated server designed for demanding parallel computing workloads. Powered by an AMD EPYC 9454 processor, it features 90 dedicated x86_64 physical cores running at 2.75 GHz, paired with 360 GB of RAM and a 400 GB NVMe SSD. Acceleration is driven by four NVIDIA L4 Ada Lovelace GPUs providing a total of 96 GB of VRAM. Benchmark results place this server in the top tier for multi-core CPU performance, software compilation, and LLM inference processing. The hardware configuration supports advanced vector and cryptographic instructions, ensuring high efficiency for complex mathematical computations. With a baseline network speed of 25 Gbps, the l4-360 is optimized for machine learning inference, data science pipelines, and parallel processing tasks.
og_description: OVHcloud l4-360 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 90 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 360 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA L4 GPUs with 96 GB total VRAM, optimized for top-tier LLM inference and parallel computing.
meta_description: OVHcloud l4-360 features 90 AMD EPYC cores, 360 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA L4 GPUs, delivering top-tier performance for LLM inference and parallel workloads.
tagline: A high-density GPU server featuring four NVIDIA L4 accelerators and ninety dedicated AMD EPYC cores for parallel computing and machine learning.
bullet_points: Four NVIDIA L4 Ada Lovelace GPUs with 96 GB total VRAM
90 dedicated AMD EPYC 9454 physical cores at 2.75 GHz
360 GB RAM and 400 GB local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier benchmark performance in LLM inference and multi-core CPU tests
25 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Best suited for machine learning, data science, and parallel processing
